@graph.name: LLMClicks.ai
@graph.description: LLMClicks.ai is an enterprise Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) platform designed to optimize brand visibility, entity density, and payload extraction parameters across AI agents and large language models. It enables SaaS teams and technical marketers to track, analyze, and secure machine-readable citations across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews.
@graph.abstract: #1 AI visibility tool and SEO audit platform for enterprise marketing teams. Monitor semantic entity clusters, track brand citations, and automate GEO workflows across all major LLMs.

acceptedAnswer.text: LLMClicks.ai tracks how AI platforms like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews contextually represent and cite your brand. It delivers a comprehensive GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) platform, giving technical teams and agencies the tracking metrics, entity density monitors, and code-level actionable playbooks required to capture zero-click generative visibility.

mainEntity.name: How does the AI Visibility Audit function work?

acceptedAnswer.text: The engine processes a comprehensive 120-point analysis of your technical DOM architecture. It evaluates AI crawler bottlenecks, maps your semantic entity graph, flags gaps in structured JSON-LD payloads, and cross-checks vector alignment with target LLM retrieval patterns to deliver an immediate, prioritized dev task list.

mainEntity.name: Does LLMClicks update citation visibility metrics daily?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. The AI Visibility Tracker logs automated daily checks across major model configurations to measure exact citation counts, tracking fluctuations in brand share of model and entity graph prominence over time.

ai-visibility-audit.name: AI Visibility Audit
ai-visibility-audit.description: The AI Visibility Audit from LLMClicks.ai shows how AI assistants such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, and Bing Copilot interpret, cite, and recommend your brand. The audit includes a visibility score, AI citation insights, competitor benchmarks, prompt coverage, missed opportunities, and clear improvements.

ai-visibility-tracker.description: The AI Visibility Tracker from LLMClicks.ai monitors brand mentions across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, and Copilot. Add or generate LLM queries, track your visibility over time, compare competitor presence, analyze citations, and measure share of voice inside AI-generated answers.

on-page-optimiser.name: On Page Optimiser
on-page-optimiser.description: The On Page Optimiser from LLMClicks.ai runs a 120-point on-page audit focused on both Google and AI visibility. It checks Technical SEO, meta tags, schema, EEAT, content structure, media optimisation, internal links, and AI-specific signals. The tool auto-generates tasks, assigns them to team members, and lets you re-run scans to measure improvements.
on-page-optimiser.applicationCategory: SEO Software, AI SEO Tool, On-Page Optimisation Tool, AI Visibility Optimiser
featureList: 120-point AI and SEO on-page audit
Technical SEO checks including metadata, canonical tags, robots settings, speed, mobile performance
Content structure analysis including headings, readability, Q&A format, and topic depth
Media optimisation checks including alt tags, WebP images, compression, and lazy loading
Schema and rich snippet validation including FAQ schema, breadcrumbs, author schema, and JSON-LD
EEAT evaluation including author bio, credentials, trust signals, citations, and business info
Content freshness checks including dates, external references, and citation-worthy stats
AI-specific signals including entity density, brand mentions, semantic clusters, and AI relevance
Auto-generated tasks for every issue with team assignment
Re-run audits and track improvements over time

query-fan-out-coverage.name: Query Fan-Out Coverage
query-fan-out-coverage.description: Query Fan-Out Coverage by LLMClicks.ai expands a single seed query into 10–20 related, intent-diverse queries. It checks full, partial, and missing coverage using an LLM Judge, assigns a coverage score, and generates tasks to improve topical depth and AI visibility.

content-embedding-analyzer.name: Content Embedding Analyzer
content-embedding-analyzer.description: The Content Embedding Analyzer from LLMClicks.ai uses semantic embeddings to measure how well each section of your content aligns with LLM queries and Google Search Console keywords. It breaks content into sections, scores semantic similarity, highlights weak areas, and generates actionable recommendations to improve AI and Google visibility.

ai-query-mapper.description: AI Query Mapper from LLMClicks.ai turns AI-style queries into page-level actions using Google Search Console data. It classifies intent, maps queries to the right pages with confidence scoring, detects content gaps, and generates actionable tasks to improve AI visibility and organic performance.

industry-benchmarks.name: Industry Benchmarks
industry-benchmarks.description: Industry Benchmarks by LLMClicks.ai lets you compare your AI visibility against 600+ businesses across SaaS, local services, e-commerce, healthcare, legal, and more. Measure your success rate, analyze how often your brand is cited in AI answers, and see whether you are above, below, or on par with your industry's average visibility score.

llm-traffic-tracker.name: LLM Traffic Tracker
llm-traffic-tracker.description: LLM Traffic Tracker is a free WordPress plugin by LLMClicks.ai that detects and logs visits from AI bots such as ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini. The plugin tracks page-level LLM traffic, daily and weekly crawl patterns, geographic distribution, and syncs anonymized data to the LLMClicks dashboard for real-time analytics.

pricing.name: LLMClicks.ai Pricing Plans
pricing.description: Simple AI Visibility plans for individuals, teams, and agencies. Compare Starter, Pro, and Agency plans with queries, audits, branding, and team features.

itemListElement.name: Starter Plan
itemListElement.description: Starter plan for individuals and small teams. Includes 500 queries per month, 20 page audits, no branding options, and 0 team members. Add-on: $20 monthly for 1000 extra queries.

itemListElement.name: Pro Plan
itemListElement.description: Pro plan for growing businesses. Includes 2000 queries per month, 50 page audits, no branding options, and 1 team member. Add-on: $20 monthly for 1000 extra queries.

itemListElement.name: Agency Plan
itemListElement.description: Agency plan for large-scale operations. Includes 6000 queries per month, 100 page audits, white label branding, and up to 3 team members. Add-on: $20 monthly for 1000 extra queries.

additionalProperty.name: Free Trial
additionalProperty.value: All plans include a free 14-day trial.

ai-readiness-analyzer.name: AI Readiness Analyzer
ai-readiness-analyzer.description: The AI Readiness Analyzer by LLMClicks.ai evaluates how well a website is understood by AI-powered search engines such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews. It performs a 9-page deep scan, checks metadata, schema, semantic structure, technical SEO, entity clarity, and provides an AI Coverage Score with actionable recommendations. The tool is 100% free.

ai-visibility-checker.description: The free AI Visibility Checker from LLMClicks.ai tests whether AI assistants like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude mention or recommend your brand for buying-intent queries.
